creator: software@bertram-scharpf.de
text:
In December 2015 I filed a problem report. It's number is 205604. It's about a real problem that is not very difficult to understand.

Until today, I have not received one single answer, neither postive nor negative.

Did the report arrive anywhere at all? Or is it just that you have to be a member of the autistic developer mishpoke to be noticed?

This ignorant behaviour is really offending. I'm fed up with this. Shame on you!
